name: repo39
description: Token-optimized repository explorer for AI agents. Directory trees, symbol maps, dependency parsing, git diffs, and content search — all designed to minimize token usage.

binaryPath.description: Path to the repo39 binary. Defaults to 'repo39' (must be in PATH).

binaryPath.label: Binary path
binaryPath.help: Absolute path to the repo39 binary, or leave empty to use PATH
